report.summary: Cycle 9 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC ~$66,008 (flat from v8). ETH ~$1,985 (-4% daily, sub-$2K). F&G 12-13 (Extreme Fear, ~50 day streak — all-time record). DELTA: Uncommitted files 344→357 (+13). Published pages 592→596 (+4 promoted). build-6 shipped 2 bear-market guides (bear market investing + smart money signals). community-v9 drafted tweets #229-231 + SVG social card. eod-v8 confirmed 0 regressions, 4 queue items ready. All 6 agents ran last hour. 43 total agent runs today. Deploy blocked 19th consecutive cycle.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,008 (flat from v8's $66,194, -0.3%). $66K support still holding. Down 24.6% YTD, ~48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran geopolitical tensions + oil above $100 continue to suppress risk assets. Whale accumulation ongoing — 270K BTC, exchange reserves at 7-year low (2.21M BTC, 5.88% supply).

ETH: ~$1,985 (-4.05% daily per CoinGabbar). Sub-$2K for consecutive cycles. Down ~60% from Aug 2025 high ($4,953). ETH/BTC ratio at multi-year lows ~0.030. SOL at $82.95 (-72% from highs). Total crypto market cap $2.36-2.37T.

F&G INDEX: 12-13 (Extreme Fear). CoinMarketCap: 12, BlockchainMagazine: 12, SpotedCrypto: 13. Streak now ~50 days — ALL-TIME RECORD (surpassing post-FTX 38d, crypto winter 42d). $450M liquidated in 24h, 122K traders wiped. $8.7B quarterly options expired today (max pain $70K vs market $66K).

DELTA FROM CYCLE 8 (standup-v8): BTC $66,194→$66,008 (-0.3%). ETH flat at $1,985. F&G stable 12-13 (streak extended to ~50 days). Uncommitted files 344→357 (+13). Published pages 592→596 (+4 promoted). build-6 shipped 2 new learn guides. community-v9 drafted 3 more tweets (#229-231) + SVG card. eod-v8 confirmed 0 regressions. No new commits. No deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 9 OF MARCH 28. Eight full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + this standup = 43 total agent runs today. Breakdown: standup×9, build×6, publish×5, design×7, community×8 (skipped v2), eod×8.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE CYCLE 8: build-6 created 2 new learn guides — Bear Market Investing Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, historical fear returns, fear-weighted DCA, on-chain bottom signals, asset allocation) and Smart Money On-Chain Signals Guide 2026 (~3,600 words, exchange flows, whale patterns, MVRV/aSOPR/NVT, 7-platform tools comparison). Both SEO-optimized with Article + FAQ schemas. community-v9 drafted tweets #229-231 (options expiry aftermath, 50-day fear streak thread, smart money divergence) + newsletter v38 addendum #2 + SVG social card (50-Day Fear Streak). eod-v8 confirmed 0 regressions, 145 TS errors (stable), 4 queue items ready to promote.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 357 uncommitted files (+13 from v8), 19th cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 4 queue items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees, Bear Market, Smart Money). (4) ~103 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (5) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking JSX). (6) 0/6 API routes rate-limited. (7) Git index.lock may be stale (reported by publish-v5).
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 357 files pending (31 modified + 326 untracked). All changes additive — zero destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 596 slugs in config (+4 since last standup). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 6 items (2 blocked, 4 ready). Content velocity today: 18+ pages built across 6 build cycles. 231 tweets drafted cumulative. 38 newsletter versions + 2 addenda. 25+ OG images. 52+ SVG social cards.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 19TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 357 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. 18+ pages, 25+ OG images, and every schema/metadata fix built today is invisible to production. Google cannot index any of it. Time-sensitive content (50-day F&G record streak, $8.7B options expiry, Morgan Stanley MSBT, SEC rulings) rapidly aging out of news cycles. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage. Every hour of delay = lost indexing opportunity.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 4 READY QUEUE ITEMS: DePIN Ecosystem, Crypto Gas Fees, Bear Market Investing, and Smart Money On-Chain Signals guides are all built, QA'd, and ready to move from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Quick config change — next publish cycle should execute this. Combined ~14,000 words of SEO-optimized content targeting high-intent bear market queries.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON FEAR STREAK RECORD NARRATIVE: F&G at 12-13 for 50 consecutive days is the ALL-TIME RECORD. Historically, every extended fear streak preceded a major rally (post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, crypto winter +306%). Our Fear & Greed Timeline page, whale tracker, and DCA calculator are perfectly positioned. Community has drafted tweets + social cards — need deploy to make content reachable. This narrative window is closing as sentiment eventually shifts.
